summary: Synthetic baseline review result for deterministic structured-result regression checks.

findings.title: Escalation wording overstates certainty
findings.summary: The synthetic summary implies a definitive blocker even though the evidence only supports a caution.
findings.recommendation: Restore caveated wording before treating the issue as blocker-grade.

findings.title: Action boundary is explicit
findings.summary: The review result reports concerns without deciding approval, publication, routing, or remediation ownership.
findings.recommendation: Keep downstream policy and action mapping in the embedding repo.

findings.title: Reviewer scope is documented
findings.summary: The synthetic packet says the comparison is for review-output behavior only.
findings.recommendation: Keep routing, approvals, and remediation ownership in the embedding repo.

provenance.label: Privacy boundary
provenance.value: No real source paths, tracker identifiers, account data, private facts, or domain policy

markdown:
# Summary
Synthetic baseline review result for deterministic structured-result regression checks.

## Findings
- Medium: Escalation wording overstates certainty.
- Low: Action boundary is explicit.
- Low: Reviewer scope is documented.

## Boundary
This fixture uses only generic labels and leaves approval, routing, remediation, and publication policy caller-owned.
